question: Series: Team WE Inhibitor Handicap (-1.5) vs Ninjas in Pyjamas (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Team WE and Ninjas in Pyjamas in the LPL Group Perseverance, scheduled for January 22 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team WE" if Team WE secures 2 or more inhibitors than Ninjas in Pyjamas in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Ninjas in Pyjamas".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Series: Virtus.pro Kill Handicap (-14.5) vs  Pipsqueak+4 (+14.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Virtus.pro and  Pipsqueak+4 in the ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Virtus.pro" if Virtus.pro secures 15 or more kills than  Pipsqueak+4 in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to " Pipsqueak+4".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Game Handicap: NGX (-1.5) vs Team Liquid (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Team Liquid and Nigma Galaxy in the ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nigma Galaxy" if Nigma Galaxy wins 2 or more games than Team Liquid in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Team Liquid".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Game Handicap: NGX (-1.5) vs Team Liquid (+1.5)

question: Total Rounds Over/Under 52.5
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Passion UA and G2 in the IEM Krakow Play-In, scheduled for January 28 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of rounds across all maps in this match is greater than or equal to 53.

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Passion UA vs G2 (BO3) - IEM Krakow Play-In
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Passion UA and G2 in the IEM Krakow Play-In, scheduled for January 28 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Passion UA" if Passion UA win the match against G2.

This market will resolve to "G2" if G2 win the match against Passion UA.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Bad Luck and Charrados FC in the CCT South America Series #7 Group Stage, scheduled for January 18 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Charrados FC" if Charrados FC wins 2 or more maps than Bad Luck in this match.

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

This market refers to the LoL match between KT Rolster and T1 in the LCK Cup Group Stage, scheduled for January 23 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "KT Rolster" if KT Rolster secures the most nashors across all games in the match. 

This market will resolve to "T1" if T1 secures the most nashors across all games in the match.

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 19, 11:30AM-11:45AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Dota 2: Team Falcons vs Natus Vincere (BO3) - ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Team Falcons and Natus Vincere in the ESL One Birmingham: Western Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team Falcons" if Team Falcons win the match against Natus Vincere.

This market will resolve to "Natus Vincere" if Natus Vincere win the match against Team Falcons.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.
